song.title: Behold How Good a Thing
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Behold how good a thing It is to dwell in peace; How pleasing to our King, This fruit of righteousness;|| When brethren all in one agree, They know the joy of unity! They know the joy of unity!
[V2] 2) When all are sweetly joined (True followers of the Lamb), They’re one in heart and mind, They think and speak the same;|| When all in love together dwell; The comfort is unspeakable! The comfort is unspeakable!
[V3] 3) Where unity takes place, The joys of heav’n we prove; This is the gospel grace, The unction from above;|| The Spirit on all saints is shed, Descending swift from Christ our Head. Descending swift from Christ our Head.
[V4] 4) Where unity is found, The sweet anointing grace Extends to all around, And consecrates the place;|| To every waiting soul it comes, And fills it with divine perfumes. And fills it with divine perfumes.
[V5] 5) The riches of His grace In fellowship are given To Zion’s chosen race, The citizens of heaven:|| He fills them with His choicest store, He gives them life for evermore. He gives them life for ev ermore.
song.author: Charles Wesley
